title: Umapyoi
description: A "Uma Musume Pretty Derby" theme, "Training & Inheritance" gameplay Minecraft Mod.
body:
# Umapyoi  

***
## 🏃 Introduction  
Here comes the *Umapyoi Mod*!

*Umapyoi Mod* is a Minecraft mod focusing on refining your equipment, by selective breeding of quality bloodlines and inheriting excellent qualities from generation to generation, which is based on the mobile game *Uma Musume Pretty Derby*. Though many of its contents pay homage to the original game, we have tried our best to provide all of you trainers a well-designed gameplay. The most important thing that different is, you will "train" yourself and build your own abilities up.

With this mod, you can turn into your beloved Umamusume, conquest the snow-covered mountain, or the sun-burned desert with your speed. All you want to do is just to run foreward, to explore the world, not considering anything behind and dusts on your training outfit. Run forward, for the tough will in your blood, for the blazing soul in your body. 

Start your own Umamusume adventure story in the world of Minecraft!
  
## 📄 Features
1. Exquisite character model.   
2. Original game restoration, including items, skills, training, factor inheritance and "drawing gacha".  
3. Data-Driven "Umamusume Pack" for custom characters. Modspack friendly.  
and more in the future...  
  
## ❗️ Precautions  
If you need feedback, please send it to our github issues: https://github.com/0999312/umapyoi/issues .  
We are using Mysterious Mountain Lib(Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/mmlib) as a library.  
You don't have to check for library updates all the time, but we recommend you keep the library up to date.  

## 📫 Discord
We have a discord server now!  
Link:[Umapyoi Mod](https://discord.gg/XCsbrGZrXs)

## 🔨 **Fabric Version**  
There is a Fabric port of Umapyoi now!  
Link:[Umapyoi Fabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/umapyoi-fabric)  
😁Thank you, LeadRDRK!  

***
